text: I find myself in an almost sterile corridor, the light cool and clean, my reflection endlessly doubled by glass. The quiet amplifies my own internal dialogue—a sense of being both present and detached, as if on the threshold of an event or idea yet to unfold. When I move into the second space, vibrant walls and focused text stimulate my curiosity. The atmosphere throbs with creative potential. The large 'R+D' on the wall reminds me how knowledge is always in flux, tethered between research and discovery. I am pulled deeper into contemplation, surrounded by signs of innovation. The presence of another—studying, reading—makes me feel part of a communal quest. I feel invigorated and engaged.
